post.description: This API endpoint allows you to query the Voiceflow Knowledge Base Preview function and retrieve answers to user questions.

question.description: A string representing the question asked by the user.

chunkLimit.description: Control the amount of chunks used to synthesize the response. In theory, the more chunks retrieved - the more accurate the response and the more tokens consumed. In reality, the "accuracy" tied to chunks is strongly associated with how the KB documents are structured. The default number of chunks we pull is 2, at a max length of 1000 tokens. That's up to 2000 tokens worth of context with the highest similarity match score to the question. If the KB docs are structured so that topics are grouped together, this should be more than enough to accurately answer the question. However, if the user has their information scattered throughly many different KB data sources, then likely more chunks (and of smaller size), will increase the accuracy of the response. You can control the max chunk size using the upload or replace KB doc APIs today using the query parameter - "maxchunkSize").

synthesis.description: Optional - A boolean value indicating whether to use language models to generate an answer. False will return null in the output response and provide the chunks only.

model.description: Optional - The language model to use for summarization. Available models are "text-davinci-003", "gpt-3.5-turbo", "claude-instant-v1", "claude-v1", "claude-v2", and "gpt-4".

temperature.description: Optional - The temperature parameter for language model sampling. Must be between 0-1. This will allow you to influence how much variation your responses will have from the prompt. Higher temperature will result in more variability in your responses. Lower temperature will result in responses that directly address the prompt, providing more exact answers. We recommend between 0.1-0.2 for temperature.

system.default: You are an AI FAQ assistant. Information will be provided to help answer the user's questions. Always summarize your response to be as brief as possible and be extremely concise. Your responses should be fewer than a couple of sentences. Do not reference the material provided in your response.
system.description: Optional - A system message to provide guidance for the AI chat assistant.

settings.description: Optional - An object for modifying the Knowledge Base settings.

items.description: An array of KB tag labels to filter document eligibility to respond to a query.

operator.description: Optional - The operator to use for combining multiple tags in the "items" array. Default is "or" for include.

include.description: Filter KB documents eligible to answer the query by whether they have specific KB tags attached.

items.description: An array of KB tag labels to filter document eligibility to respond to a query.

operator.description: Optional - The operator to use for combining multiple tags in the "items" array. Default is "and" for exclude.

exclude.description: Filter KB documents eligible to answer the query by the absence of specific KB tags.

includeAllTagged.description: Filter KB documents eligible to answer the query by whether they have any KB tags attached.

includeAllNonTagged.description: Filter KB documents eligible to answer the query by the absence of all KB tags.

tags.description: Optional - Filter documents eligible to answer the query using KB tags.

score.description: A value indicating the relevance or similarity of the chunk to the question.

chunkID.description: The unique identifier of the chunk. A chunk is a section of text.

documentID.description: The unique identifier of the document containing the chunk.

content.description: The actual content of the chunk.

name.description: A readable name for the source.

url.description: The full URL of the source.

tags.description: An array of tag labels associated with the document.

queryTokens.description: In the API call, these are the query tokens consumed by the LLM during answer synthesis only. Voiceflow takes the returned chunks + KB Settings + user question and asks the LLM to provide an answer.

answerTokens.description: In the API call, these are the answer tokens consumed by the LLM during answer synthesis only. This directly represents the token "length" of the response provided (and can be controlled in KB Settings using maxTokens)

totalTokens.description: The sum of query and answer tokens consumed to return this response.

DialogManagerAPIKey.name: Authorization
DialogManagerAPIKey.description:
All requests made to any Knowledge Base APIs must be validated with a Dialog Manager API Key.

To obtain a Dialog Manager API key, go to the Integration tab on the project you uploaded data sources to and click the "Copy API key" button.
